ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the article belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "reading_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time in minutes */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, blog post, whitepaper) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary or abstract of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or key phrases for better search and categorization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the article was updated */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the article has been viewed */,
  "downloads_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the article has been downloaded */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* The number of comments on the article */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* The number of ratings given to the article */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* The average rating of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "topic_type" TEXT /* Type of topic (e.g., category, subcategory) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the topic was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile photo */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* A list of the author's areas of expertise */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the author's profile was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the author's profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the article */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user's session */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consultant, researcher, admin) */,
  "profile_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* A list of the user's interests */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the user account was updated */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the article-topic relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the article-topic relationship was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_topics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was published */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* The number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the comment has been flagged for review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the comment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES article_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the rating was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* The last date the tag was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tag_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the article-tag link */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the article-tag link was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_links_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_links_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_links_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES article_tags ("tag_id")
)
